Citizens Park, 698-600 New Bridge Ct, Barrington, IL 60010, USA
Black raspberries along the paved trail. Blackberries can be found across the footbridge upon entering Cuba Marsh nature preserve. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
